libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: No Docker image or environment/system property setup is indicated. Meaningful coverage should instantiate JacksonModule via SchemaGeneratorConfigBuilder and generate schemas for local model classes using Jackson annotations such as @JsonProperty, @JsonIgnore, @JsonSubTypes/@JsonTypeInfo, @JsonUnwrapped, and relevant JacksonOption values.

deterministic_setup.reason: Documentation recommends using the same-version jsonschema-generator with jsonschema-module-jackson, and the module POM marks jsonschema-generator/Jackson APIs as provided rather than transitively resolving them for consumers.

risks: Without the explicit generator dependency, generated tests may fail to compile or only cover trivial module construction instead of real schema generation.
Tests that do not generate schemas from annotated classes may miss the library's primary behavior.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: The Jackson module is an add-on for victools jsonschema-generator and declares the core generator/Jackson APIs as provided dependencies; meaningful tests need the matching generator dependency explicitly.
